title: Alyptic Cobblemon
description:
This modpack is a kitchen sink cobblemon modpack

When creating this modpack we had a couple of goals in mind! we wanted to have more than just cobblemon to keep things a little more fresh.
body:
### **_This mod pack REQUIRES at least 6GB of ram allocated_**

### The pack is also a serverpack, just copy the mods, config, defaultconfig, kubejs, datapack folders to a new location with a neoforge 1.20.1 server and viola!

Welcome to Alyptic Cobblemon

This pack contains 300+ mods

What does your modpack add? 
Random Trainer Battles

60+ fakemon

Create and several additions to integrate it with Cobblemon with immersive engineering and many other mods that suit anyone's fancy. The idea for this pack was cobblemon in a kitchen sink back that had decent integration with other mods in it.

What features does it have?

It has plenty of mods to suit anyone's needs, there aren't very many kitchen sink-style cobblemon packs and so we went ahead and created one of the first! we hope you enjoy Alyptic cobblemon! 



Why would you want to download it?

Why not? we have plenty of tech, magic, pokemon mods that spice up Minecraft and it all runs pretty dang well to boot. Great performance and Great mods? uh Yes, please!!!!!!



We also have a couple of mods from Curseforge That needs to be mentioned
Such as 

[cosmetic armor reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

[time in a bottle forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/time-in-a-bottle-forge)

[time in a bottle curio support](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/time-in-a-bottle-curio-support)

[cobblemonrider](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemonrider)
